scripts.test:e2e: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; COMPOSE=(docker compose -p grid-binance-e2e --env-file .env.example -f deploy/docker/docker-compose.yml -f deploy/docker/docker-compose.e2e.yml); cleanup(){ "${COMPOSE[@]}" down -v >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; }; cleanup; trap cleanup EXIT; "${COMPOSE[@]}" up -d --wait postgres redis; playwright test --config apps/web/playwright.config.ts'
